prestazioni: Engine swap to a **6VE1-W** (3.5L DOHC 24V V6, 230hp stock) with a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (0.82 A/R, 62mm inducer) paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** (12psi base boost, adjustable via AEM X-Series boost controller). Forged internals include **Manley I-beam connecting rods**, **JE 8.5:1 forged pistons**, and **ARP head studs** for 10.5:1 static compression. Fueling upgrades include **ID1000x injectors** and a **Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump** with a **Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator**.

Custom **ECU reflash via HP Tuners** (specific to the 6VE1-W) with a **standalone AEM Infinity 7** for advanced tuning, including **individual cylinder fuel trimming** and **launch control** (0-60mph in 4.8s). Exhaust system features a **custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe** (catless) with a **Borla Pro XS 3.5" cat-back** (resonated, 304 stainless, 4" dual outlets).

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (8-way adjustable damping, 20mm drop) paired with **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bars (24mm)** and **SuperPro poly bushings** (front control arms, subframe). Braking system includes **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors front, 330mm rear)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (custom-fitted for Axiom S, 3-piece overfenders, 2.5" wider front/3" wider rear) with **carbon fiber front splitter** (custom-made, 3" overhang) and **custom aluminum rear diffuser** (integrated tow hook, 4" fins). Paint scheme: **PPG Custom Matte Graphite with gloss black accents** (roof, mirrors, diffuser).

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels** (19x9.5 +25 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Fender flares rolled and pulled with **custom aluminum rivet reinforcement** (1/8" thick, 100 rivets per side).

**Seibon carbon fiber hood** (custom vented, 3" scoop for intercooler ducting) with **LED halo headlights** (Morimoto XB, 5500K) and **custom C-pillar badges** (laser-etched "6VE1-W TURBO" in 304 stainless). Interior features **Recaro Pole Position seats** (custom Alcantara/red stitching) with **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** (350mm, suede) and **custom aluminum gauge pod** (AEM X-Series wideband, boost, oil pressure).
